6 Statutory f�struments 13th January, 2012
IN EXERCISE of the powers contained in section twenty-six of the
Registration of Business Names Act, 2011, the following Regulations
are hereby made:
PART I
PRELIMINARY
Title I. These Regulations may be cited as the Registration of
Business Names Regulations, 2012.
PART II
REGISTRATION
Application 2. (1) An application for the reservation of a business name
for shall be made in Form I set out in the First Schedule.
reservation
(2) A notice of reservation of business name shall be in Form
of business
name II set out in the First Schedule.
Application 3. (1) An application for registration ofa business name shall
for be in Form III set out in the First' Schedule.
'
registration
(2) A request for further particulars s�all be made in Form IV
set out in the First Schedule.
Certificate 4. The Registrar shall, within fourteen days of acceptance of
of an application for registration, issue a certificate ofregistration to
registration the applicant in Form V set out in the First Schedule.

sections.heading: The Registrar shall, where the Registrar rejects an
sections.text:
Rejection of
application for registration of a business name, inform the applicant
application
of the rejection in Form VI set out in the First Schedule.
Surrender of 6. ( 1) An individual or firm shall, where the individual or firm
certificate decides not to continue operating the business to which the
certificate of registration relates, surrender the certificate of
registration with Form VII set out in the First Schedule.
..
(2) The Registrar shall, where a certificate of registration is
surrendered under sub-regulation (1 ), cancel the certificate of
registration.
Transfer of 7. An application for the transferofa certificate ofregistration
certificate shall be made in Form VIII set out in the First Schedule.
Suspension or 8. (!) The.Registrar shall, before suspending or cancelling a
cancellation certificate ofregistration, notify the holder of the intention to suspend
of certificate or cancel the certificate of registration in Form IX set out in the
First Schedule.
(2) The Registrar shall, where the Registrar suspends or
cancels a certificate of registration, inform the holder in Form X
set out in the First Schedule.

PART III
GENERAL PROVISIONS

sections.heading: (I) An individual or firm shall, not later than three months Filing of
sections.text:
after the end of its financial year, complete and submit an annual annual return
return in Form XIV set out in the First Schedule.
(2) An annual return submitted to the Registrar under sub­
regulation ( 1) shall be signed-
where the return relates to a sole trader or individual, by
(a)
the sole trader or the individual; and
(b) where the return relates to a firm, by all the partners,
nominees or trustees, as applicable.
(3) A person who signs an annual return under paragraph (b)
of sub regulation (2) in accordance with section eight of the Act
shall lodge the return together with a statutory declaration to the
effect that the person is acting as a nominee or trustee under the
authority of or on behalf of a foreign company or corporation.

sections.heading: The fees set out in the Second Schedule shall. be payable Fees
sections.text: respecting the matters specified therein.
